name: harness-hub
description: Harness Hub monorepo root (SYS-HUB-FOUNDATION-P02 で構成確定)

scripts.check:secrets: node scripts/ci/check-required-package-script.mjs packages/inspection/package.json scan:secrets && pnpm --filter @harness-hub/inspection run scan:secrets
scripts.check:drift: node scripts/ci/check-required-package-script.mjs packages/schemas/package.json check:drift && pnpm --filter @harness-hub/schemas run check:drift
scripts.verify: pnpm check:pnpm && pnpm check:duplicates && pnpm lint && pnpm typecheck && pnpm build && pnpm --filter @harness-hub/hub run build:worker && pnpm test && pnpm check:secrets && pnpm check:drift && pnpm check:bundle
